overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia traversing a snowy mountain ridge at night before descending into a forested valley. The clip captures the transition from open snow-covered peaks to an enclosed woodland trail under moonlight, with the character walking steadily through changing terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain ridge with rocky outcrops

events.description: character turns around on the snow ridge to survey the mountain vista
character pauses briefly before continuing along the ridge

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the narrow snow ridge, pausing to look around at the mountain vista and turning to survey the surroundings

entered.detail: narrow snow-covered mountain path with footprints
steep rock face with patches of snow
raised snow bank lining the path
snow-capped mountain visible in the distance under night sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt traverses a narrow snow-covered mountain ridge under a clear night sky. The open terrain features steep rocky cliffs and snow banks lining the path. The character pauses to turn and survey the vast mountain vista before continuing along the ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt trail through dense coniferous forest

events.description: ground surface changes from snow to grass and dirt as character descends into forest
vegetation becomes denser as character enters deeper forest area

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest trail, navigating between trees and rocky outcrops as the path winds through the woodland

entered.detail: narrow trail transitioning from snow to grass and dirt
tall coniferous trees lining the path
tall coniferous trees lining the path
large boulders and rocks alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from open snow to an enclosed forest trail as Geralt descends from the mountain. The ground changes to dirt and grass, surrounded by dense pine trees that block the night sky. The character continues walking along the winding path, passing rocky outcrops and fallen trees as the forest becomes progressively denser.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an exposed, snowy mountain ridge into the depths of a dense nocturnal forest. It begins with Geralt traversing a narrow path lined with snow banks and steep rocky cliffs under a clear night sky, pausing briefly to survey the vast mountain vista. As the character descends from the peaks, the open terrain gradually gives way to an enclosed forest trail where the ground shifts from snow to dirt and grass. The scene then tightens as the camera follows the winding path past rocky outcrops and fallen trees, with towering pine trees increasingly blocking the moonlight. Finally, the environment becomes progressively denser, fully immersing the character within the thick woodland.
